commit_scope: Move the emitted world-model live cycle floor forward by making native-teacher retirement and world-growth embodiment receipt-backed, then prove local process receipts with actual macOS TTS and local Ollama runs.

commands: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/json.fk form-stdlib/pareto.fk form-stdlib/autoresearch-loop.fk form-stdlib/nearest-shape.fk form-stdlib/classifier-eval.fk form-stdlib/native-training-receipt.fk form-stdlib/real-mesh-training-carrier.fk form-stdlib/real-mesh-training-emitter.fk form-stdlib/tests/real-mesh-training-emitter-band.fk
local_validation.notes: Focused Form validation returned 65535 across Go, Rust, TypeScript, and fkwu. The dedicated fourth-arm check returned PASS-4WAY real-mesh-training-emitter. Runtime proof with local macOS say and local Ollama llama3.2:3b produced three completed process receipts and cleared process_receipt_floor_missing from the cycle. Native teacher and world growth receipts are hashed and accepted as earned/embodied.

commands: Hostinger Auto Deploy on main after merge
deploy_validation.notes: No public HTTP endpoint behavior changes are expected; deploy validation remains pending until merge.

phase_gate.reason: Local Form proof, runtime receipt proof, structural checks, and wellness pass; CI and post-merge deploy validation are pending.

evidence_refs: cd form && ./validate.sh ... real-mesh-training-emitter-band.fk -> 65535; kernels agree on every sample; fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way
cd form && bash scripts/fourth-arm-gate.sh real-mesh-training-emitter -> PASS-4WAY real-mesh-training-emitter

.cache/real-mesh-training/windows/live-cycle-active-proof-20260615b/real-mesh-training-window.json -> completed_processes=3, native_teacher.earned=true, world_growth.embodied=true, cycle block reasons only capability_liveness_missing
process receipts: macos-say text-to-speech stdout_bytes=177312; local-ollama nl-to-nl stdout_bytes=2040; local-ollama sentiment stdout_bytes=656

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The live-cycle emitter can now consume hashed native-teacher and world-growth receipts. When those receipts are valid, native_wins becomes 1 and growth_status becomes embodied in the Form-aligned projection. With local model probes enabled, the process floor is proven by real macOS and Ollama processes; the current machine leaves only capability liveness as the world_model_live_cycle block.
public_endpoints: local-only: scripts/real_mesh_training_emitters.sh writes real-mesh-training-window.json; no public HTTP endpoint changed
test_flows: A native-teacher receipt is accepted only when sample floor is met, native reaches the oracle within margin, and a content hash exists.
A world-growth receipt is accepted only when status is embodied, reason is follow, at least three parts exist, and a content hash exists.
Local run-models proof produced three completed process receipts from actual macOS TTS and Ollama tasks.

The receipt-backed runtime projection cleared native_teacher_retirement_unproven, world_growth_embodiment_unproven, and process_receipt_floor_missing; capability_liveness_missing remains because the witness endpoint reports present=false.
